steps.title: Identify the key example
steps.content: The dash introduces a marketing campaign as the concrete example of what “can play a big role” in a book's commercial success. A marketing campaign is fundamentally a publicity effort.

steps.title: Match the example to the blank
steps.content: Publicity—public awareness and attention—is what a marketing campaign generates. Originality, complexity, and practicality describe qualities of the book itself, not what a marketing campaign creates. That matches choice B — B is correct.
